title: desmotrichum stenoglossum
intro: Desmotrichum stenoglossum is a species of fern found in tropical regions, particularly in India and Southeast Asia, and it belongs to the family Hypnales. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Desmotrichum stenoglossum include its potential to treat various ailments, such as fever, cold, and respiratory infections, as well as its use as a diuretic to treat urinary problems. Desmotrichum stenoglossum is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infusion by steeping the leaves in hot water, and it can also be used as a poultice to apply topically for wound healing.
